The text is centered over the grid of food images.

spatial: The white text is centered in the foreground, overlaying the 3x3 grid of food images which fills the background.

visible_entities.desc: Nine-panel grid of food dishes including fried chicken, yellow rice with shrimp, orange curry, rolled meat slices, roasted chicken with lime, stew, stuffing, yellow soup, and stuffed bread bowls.
White text with a drop shadow reading 'Thank you for watching'.

atomic_facts.fact: A grid of nine different food dishes is displayed on the screen.
The text 'Thank you for watching' is overlaid on the center of the video.
The video clip serves as an outro or closing screen.

spatial: The text 'Thank you for watching' is centered on the screen, overlaying the grid of food images. The food images are arranged in three rows and three columns, filling the background.

The two book covers are placed side-by-side in the center, with the 'WELL... I LIKE THEM' book to the left of the 'Rough Diamond Recipes' book. The Facebook logo is to the right of the book covers.
